caption: The video features a presentation by Alejandro Saucedo, who is introduced as the CTO of Exponential Technologies, Chairman of The Institute for Ethical AI & ML, a member of the Broader AI Expert Group at the European Commission, and part of the Advisory group TeensInAI. The presentation is titled "Industrial Machine Learning: Horizontally Scalable Data Pipelines with Airflow" and was given at EuroPython in Edinburgh from July 23-29, 2018. In the video, Alejandro stands behind a podium, addressing an audience while a slide behind him displays his credentials and contact information. The setting suggests a professional conference environment focused on advanced topics in machine learning and data science.
